highlights.description: Add annotations, alternatives, conditions, notes, and nested phases to PIDL
Enhanced renderers with support for alt/else blocks, opt conditionals, and nested phase visualization
Comprehensive validation for phase hierarchies and new flow features

added.description: AnnotationType enum: security, performance, deprecated, info, warning, error
Annotation type with Type, Text, and Details fields
Alternative type for alternative/error flow paths
Phase.Parent field for nested phase hierarchies
Flow.Condition field for conditional flows (when clause)
Flow.Note field for visible diagram notes
Flow.Annotations field for typed annotations
Flow.Alternatives field for alternative paths
Protocol.RootPhases(), ChildPhases(), PhaseDepth() helper methods
Flow.HasCondition(), HasNote(), HasAnnotations(), HasAlternatives() helper methods
IsValidAnnotationType() validation function
JSON Schema definitions for annotation and alternative types
Phase parent reference validation with cycle detection
Annotation type and text validation
Alternative condition and flows validation
Mermaid opt blocks for conditional flows
Mermaid alt/else blocks for alternatives
Mermaid note right of for flow notes and annotations
Mermaid colored rect blocks for nested phases
PlantUML opt/alt/else blocks for conditionals and alternatives
PlantUML colored box containers for nested phases
D2 condition label prefixes and grouped alternatives
D2 nested phase groups with hierarchy support
DOT condition edge labels and alternative edges

tests.description: Tests for nested phases, phase parent validation, circular hierarchy detection
Tests for annotation types and text validation
Tests for alternative flows, conditions, and entity references
Tests for flow helper methods (HasCondition, HasNote, etc.)
Tests for phase hierarchy helpers (RootPhases, ChildPhases, PhaseDepth)

highlights.description: Protocol Interaction Description Language - a JSON-based DSL for describing protocol choreography that compiles to diagrams
Support for OAuth 2.0, PKCE, OIDC, MCP, and A2A protocol examples
Three diagram output formats: PlantUML, Mermaid, and Graphviz DOT

added.description: Core PIDL library with Protocol, Entity, Flow, and Phase types
JSON parser with file and reader support
Validation logic with detailed error reporting
High-level operations: `ValidateFile`, `ValidateFiles`, `NewMinimalProtocol`, `WriteProtocolFile`
JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for PIDL validation
Embedded JSON Schema for programmatic access
PlantUML sequence diagram renderer
Mermaid sequence diagram renderer
Graphviz DOT data flow diagram renderer
Renderer interface with format parsing and file extension helpers
Embedded protocol examples with API: `List`, `Get`, `GetProtocol`, `GetJSON`
OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code flow example
OAuth 2.0 + PKCE flow example
OpenID Connect Authentication flow example
MCP tool invocation flow example
A2A agent delegation flow example
`pidl validate` command for validating PIDL JSON files
`pidl generate` command for generating diagrams (PlantUML, Mermaid, DOT)
`pidl examples` command for listing and showing built-in examples
`pidl init` command for creating new protocol files from templates

documentation.description: README with installation, quick start, CLI reference, and library usage
Project roadmap with phased implementation plan
UTF-8 icons for README features list

tests.description: Unit tests for core library: types, parser, validation, operations
Tests for render package: format parsing, all renderers
Tests for examples package: embedding, listing, retrieval
60 tests total with full linting compliance

infrastructure.description: Gitignore with binary and ideation file patterns
